div.p: Intel Manual Reference Quality Atomic State Transition: Pointer Stealing LSB Protocol

ul.li: CAS failure point for other concurrent modifications.

div.p: Since malloc aligns to at least 8 bytes, the lower 3 bits are always zero. We steal Bit 0 for the lock-free logical delete signal.

g.text: // Bit 0: Reserved for logical delete flag

text.tspan: // Bit 0: Reserved for logical delete flag
